fixtures._comment: headless-complete highlight pill: high-priority verbatim match. Without this, the showcase-assistant catch-all in feature-parity.json wins. Two-turn fixture: turn 1 emits the highlight_note tool call so the headless useComponent registration paints a Highlight card; turn 2 (after the tool result) emits the deterministic narration.

match.userMessage: Highlight: ship the demo on Friday
